Machine Learning Engineer with a mathematics background. I build and ship ML and deep learning systems that optimize operations and surface useful insight — with attention to the infrastructure and engineering that keeps them running in production.


\vspace{0.5em}
\section{Employment History}
\vspace{0.50em}
\cventry{}{}{Sr. Machine Learning Engineer\; | \;Afni}{Jan 2025 -- Present\vspace{-1.0em}}{}{
\begin{itemize}
\item A/B tested the hiring platform against the legacy process — hires made via the intelligence platform showed a 6\% increase in lifetime over the same time period, alongside significant improvement in KPI performance
\item Managed a team of 4 vendors/contractors and led 2 in-house developers
\item Collaborated with multiple VPs on feature discussions, roadmap, capabilities, and communications
\item Direct report to the VP of Software Engineering \& AI on day-to-day operations and progress
\item Built the core backend models for the hiring platform that evaluates 5,000+ monthly candidates across all PH sites — predictive models for customer and employee retention risk, and ranking/recommender-style models for employee performance across program placements
\item Designed a document analysis pipeline processing up to 30K documents daily with failure tracking, retries, and sufficient throughput; documents are attributed to the organizational hierarchy (employee, coach, manager) supporting RBAC, tagged using NLP and LLM tools, with a monitoring and analytics dashboard that only surfaces results users have access to based on their org hierarchy
\item Implemented an agentic solution for determining ideal program placement of candidate hires, combining program description/LOB, contractual obligations, headcount fill requirements, candidate history, and interview/assessment scores
\item Designed a repeatable feature engineering, preprocessing, training, and monitoring pipeline with a clean deployment interface for ML models served via Azure Functions; trained per-program per-KPI models, overcoming sparsity through extensive EDA
\end{itemize}
}
\vspace{0.8em}
\cventry{}{}{Machine Learning Engineer\; | \;Ubiquity}{Aug 2022 -- Jan 2025\vspace{-1.0em}}{}{
\begin{itemize}
\item Reduced cost by 6X and increased accuracy of speech recognition system by +10\%
\item Developed and deployed a transcription service which transcribed 1.2M+ production calls
\item Within 3 months after hiring, presented a POC for extending the call recorder system from mono to stereo recording using socket programming and Avaya APIs — became the basis for a major project for the Telecommunications team
\item Developed and designed a fault-tolerant distributed offline task queue service to scale speech recognition
\item Developed a Transformer-based semantic search engine that runs performant on CPU
\item Extended an existing open-source annotation tool for human data labeling to serve our internal use-case
\item Developed AI services for downstream processing, modeling, and analytics of call transcripts
\item Helped develop the backend application for searching and filtering transcriptions
\item Contributed to a masking service for images (screenshots) containing sensitive data using Tesseract
\end{itemize}
}

\item Preprocessing, analysis, and feature engineering of datasets (1M-5M) for model training, selection, and evaluation
